title: Quality Time - Beautified and Optimized
description: Vanilla plus A LOT of visual enhancements and Quality of Life mods. Aiming to make the game prettier and convenient. Client-side and optimized with Distant Horizons <3
body:
![Modloader](https://img.shields.io/badge/Modloader-Fabric-blue?logo=minecraft&logoColor=white)
![Client-side](https://img.shields.io/badge/Client--side-Yes-brightgreen)
![Vanilla](https://img.shields.io/badge/Vanilla-Enhanced-orange)

![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/519b4c0a2514a643ab6a8fd940dd2f5cc29493e6.png)
## Available for 1.21.1, 1.21.8 and 1.21.10 The Copper Age!

Full vanilla experience with client-side **QoL mods** and **a lot of visual enhancements**.
Fully optimized with **Sodium** and **Distant Horizons**.

Yes! You **can play multiplayer.**  

## Check out my new modpack: [**Quality Time - Industries**](https://modrinth.com/modpack/quality-time-industries) focused on a enhanced yet classic tech and magic experience on 1.12.2 inspired by tekkit!

## Optimization & Performance

Inspired on **[Fabulously Optimized](https://modrinth.com/modpack/fabulously-optimized)**.  
This modpack features the same core performance enhancements such as **Sodium** and **Lithium**, plus improvements for **network performance, terrain and chunk loading, entity and particle optimization, lighting, GPU and memory fixes, and more.** All Tweaked for compatibility!

- **Distant Horizons + Concurrent Chunk Management Engine + Noisium**
- **Kryption (Network Optimization) & Tick Tweaks**
- **Too Many Entities with Entity Culling**
- **ParticleCore & AsyncParticles**
- **Palladium & GPU Tape**
- **ScalableLux**
- **Fast Boot, Fast Quit and more.**

Full client-side.
All vanilla compatible.


### Fresh Animations may cause low FPS

## Enhancements
Focused on upgrading the game visuals without changing gameplay.  
**Shaderpacks and resourcepacks also packaged together!**  

- Choose your cape for free with **Cape Provider X**!
- **VanillaTweaks** is integrated and can be accessed in-game trough resourcepacks to modify as you wish.
- Download shaders and other resourcepacks in-game with **resourcify**! 

A selection of over 100 mods made with love and care <3 
### Visual

Adds effects like **fire sparks from fires and torches**, burning entity effects, **slime trails**, magic particles from Allay and Vexes, sheep fluff when sheared, **running dust clouds**, **3D water splashes and waterfall cascades**, **fireflies**, **falling leaves**, steam in cold biomes, bubbles underwater, **Cave Dust**, Elytra trails, dynamic trails for entities and projectiles, **footprint particles**, **particle rain, and improved clouds.** **and muuuuch more!**
  
Includes mods like:
- **Dynamic Lights**
- **Hold My Items**
- **Particular Reforged**
- **Subtle Effects**
- **Particle Interactions**
- **Effectual**
- **Visuality**
- **Perception**
- **Immersive Storms**
- **Wakes**
- **Make Bubbles Pop**
- **Explosive Enhancement**
- **Fresh Animations**
- **Not Enough Animations**
- **Better Clouds**
- **Particle Rain**
- **FootprintParticle**
- **Enhanced Visuals**
- **Immersive UI**
- **Continuity**
- **Visual Workbench**
- **Ambient Environment**
- and much much more!

### Sound & Music
- **Sounds**
- **Sound Physics Remastered**
- **Ambient Sounds 6**
- **Presence Footsteps**
- **The Immersive Music Mod**

## Quality of Life

Adds client-side QoL mods for a smoother and more convenient experience:
- **Enchantment Descriptions**
- **JourneyMap** 
- **Inventory HUD+** 
- **Better Mount HUD**
- **Jade**
- **Zoomify**
- **Litematica**
- **Apple Skin** 
- **Tweakeroo**
- **Inventory Sort** 
- **Held Item Info**
- **Peek (Inventories preview)**
- **Pick up Notifier**
- **Roughly Enough Items + Search Bar Calculations**
- **Item Locks**
- **Better F3**
- **Controller support**
- **Mouse Tweaks** 
- **Client Tweaks** 
- **Crafting Tweaks** 
- **Chat Patches**
- **Better Tab**
- **Fzzy Config**
- **Configured and Controlling** 
- **E4MC (LAN Multiplayer)**
and many others that enhance usability while keeping it vanilla.

## Credits  
If you are a mod author and would like your credits included, please feel free to get in touch <3  
- [Hold My Items by EnyLow](https://modrinth.com/mod/hold-my-items) - Amazing first person animations!
- [The Immersive Music Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/immersivemusicmod) - Beautiful soundtrack!
- [Fabulously Optimized](https://modrinth.com/modpack/fabulously-optimized) - Core optimization pack
